selected_direction: realistic specimen plus luxury scientific instrument
direction_statement: Archive Instrument = realistic preserved specimen + luxury instrument object + restrained scientific inspection.

references.label: Archive Instrument Current Prototype
references.borrow: Keep the central object, warmer materiality, four-state logic, and reduced root abstraction as the current baseline.
references.do_not_copy: Do not treat the current procedural geometry as final object design.
references.quality_line: Baseline is directionally useful but still lacks specimen fidelity, glass thickness, and model-asset quality.

references.label: Natural History Museum Spirit Collection
references.borrow: Borrow the preserved-specimen seriousness: real organic form, suspended volume, and quiet institutional inspection.
references.do_not_copy: Do not copy museum photography, specimen identities, labels, or collection presentation.
references.quality_line: Specimen must read as a preserved real object before any diagram, scan, or symbolic layer.

references.label: Apple Vision Pro Formed Glass
references.borrow: Borrow the cue of shaped thick glass with controlled edge highlights and luxury material restraint.
references.do_not_copy: Do not copy Apple product silhouette, interface language, brand cues, or industrial design details.
references.quality_line: Glass must feel like a physical vitrine or wet-specimen container, not a thin transparent UI shell.

references.label: ZEISS Microscopy Instrument System
references.borrow: Borrow the restrained precision of scientific inspection hardware: stable support, optical hierarchy, and clean control zones.
references.do_not_copy: Do not copy ZEISS product forms, logos, product naming, or proprietary instrument layouts.
references.quality_line: The support and inspection logic should read as deliberate instrument design rather than decorative sci-fi hardware.

references.label: iyO WebGL Exploded View
references.borrow: Borrow component hierarchy and sectioning grammar so inspection states reveal named internal layers.
references.do_not_copy: Do not copy the iyO product, page composition, hardware identity, or promotional framing.
references.quality_line: Sectioning must clarify specimen, glass, root, support, and signal layers instead of scattering parts.

references.label: WebGPU Scanning Depth Maps
references.borrow: Borrow scan-depth behavior where the sweep changes what can be inspected, not only a surface overlay.
references.do_not_copy: Do not copy the demo assets, exact shader look, or scanning composition.
references.quality_line: Scan state should expose depth, root paths, and specimen structure with an instrument-mode purpose.

references.label: Spline AI Single Object Rule
references.borrow: Borrow the single-object asset discipline: make or source one stronger specimen object before page polish.
references.do_not_copy: Do not ask generation tools for the full page, UI, brand, or final composition.
references.quality_line: Next pass should improve the asset basis instead of endlessly tuning procedural placeholder geometry.

references.label: Codrops MeshLine Family
references.borrow: Borrow authored route families and line-weight control for readable root paths and support geometry.
references.do_not_copy: Do not drift into retro plotter art, generic line demos, or copied Three.js examples.
references.quality_line: Root and support lines must read as intentional biological or instrument routes, never legs or random strokes.

still_weak: lack of high-quality model or texture assets
current_diagnosis.risk: continuing to polish procedural shapes will hide the core asset and material weakness instead of fixing it.

visual_criteria: The specimen reads as a real object before reading as a diagram.
The glass reads as a vitrine or wet-specimen container, not a transparent UI shell.
The root and support geometry cannot be mistaken for legs or random lines.
Each scroll state changes inspection logic, not just position or opacity.
The palette has warm material contrast and does not collapse into gray-green technical UI.
next_pass_moves: replace or supplement procedural plant geometry with a better modeled or generated specimen asset
rebuild glass as a believable thick container with edge highlights and refraction cues
define one strong hero camera and only modest scroll-state camera changes
reduce annotation density and make scan/section states behave like instrument modes
add screenshot-based browser review checkpoints for mobile and desktop
